owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. Current MP handoff copy/status surfaces now include the open action, share guidance, and continuity hints; the remaining 15G work is deeper host/client workflow polish and real-season validation.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: The acceptance plan is documented, indexed, surfaced in sprint mode, surfaced in the owner collaboration model, surfaced in the master architecture index, and surfaced in the v0 scope/pipeline plan; the current MP handoff slice now covers the status-window open action plus share and continuity hints in the tray/status surfaces. The first SNC friend MP sync envelope contract, manual create/verify CLI fallback, companion/tray command-template status surface, visible dashboard copy action, verify-time apply gate, visible apply-gate template input, fail-closed inbox/staging plan gate, visible inbox-plan template action, fail-closed outbox/send plan gate, and visible outbox-plan template action are implemented. The companion now also surfaces the explicit host-owned automatic handoff sync gap for host rotation, so the remaining 15G work stays discoverable and fail closed. Post-play handoff now blocks all decision inputs for campaign-level branch ambiguity instead of allowing partial generated-rule candidates from an unclear branch; release-grade companion UI still needs actual signed/encrypted transport, decrypt/verify staging, and real season validation. 3A now has a deterministic confidence-scored target memory summary on the summary-only profile contract, and the next verification step is to keep zero-history bootstrap provenance visible on current head while the remaining target-specific gameplay rule generation stays deferred.

chunks.title: Migrate legacy ministry input schema with compatibility note

acceptance: Ministry input reading preserves current schema_version 1 behavior while accepting a bounded schema_version 0 legacy fixture as partial compatibility.
Companion CLI and pipeline audit output surface the schema compatibility state and migration note for the legacy fixture.
The change stays bounded to the ministry input reader, the v0 pipeline output, and regression coverage for the legacy migration slice.

acceptance: The owner-facing playbook or equivalent doc states what to test in-game, what evidence to capture, and what limitations still remain.
The documented gap stays bounded to generated-overlay gameplay verification rather than broad strategic redesign.
The next owner run can follow the documented checklist without reinterpreting the roadmap from scratch.

chunks.title: Surface entry-point memory recovery signals

acceptance: Real-session loop output includes recovery state, confidence, anchor save identity, and warning visibility fields.
The evidence JSON carries a memory_recovery object with the same fields for downstream automation.
Branch ambiguity or missing history downgrades recovery confidence instead of pretending full certainty.

The tray-facing brief or dashboard text surfaces the guard state in a readable line and keeps unknown values fail-closed.

chunks.title: Surface daemon-loss memory recovery signals

acceptance: Companion JSON, tray text, and status-center summary expose memory recovery state, confidence, warning visibility, and the selected anchor save identity.
Confidence downgrades when history is missing, branch evidence conflicts, or no compatible anchor exists.
The new fields fail closed when entry-point analysis is unreadable or unavailable.

chunks.title: Verify branch-aware memory recovery degradation

acceptance: The companion status summary shows degraded memory recovery with reduced confidence when branch ambiguity is detected.
The snapshot JSON keeps the memory_recovery object explicit and warning-visible for ambiguous entry-point analysis.
The branch-aware recovery note stays fail-closed and does not claim high confidence under ambiguous evidence.

chunks.title: Add SNC friend package contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / user-approved SNC friend request and acceptance workflow
chunks.goal: Add the first local fail-closed friend request/acceptance package contract so future SNC friend mesh work has bounded identity, fingerprint, and capability validation before any transport or automatic sync exists.
acceptance: SNC friend request packages parse only schema_version 1 with package_type snc_friend_request and required bounded node identity fields.
SNC friend acceptance packages parse only schema_version 1 with package_type snc_friend_acceptance and match the original request by node id and fingerprint.
Unsupported capabilities, unsafe identity strings, future schemas, mismatched requests, and self-acceptance fail closed without creating trust.

chunks.title: Add SNC friend trust store contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / local friend trust store with revoke/block/disable-auto-sync controls
chunks.goal: Add a local fail-closed trusted-friend store contract so accepted SNC friend identities can be represented with explicit revoked, blocked, and auto-sync-disabled states before any transport adapter exists.
acceptance: The trust store serializes schema_version 1 friend entries with bounded identity, display alias, trust state, and auto-sync flag.
Parsing fails closed for unsupported schema, unsafe identities, unsupported states, duplicate friend node ids, and active friends with missing accepted_at evidence.
Revoked or blocked friends are represented as non-active and auto-sync disabled so future transport work cannot treat friendship as unconditional package trust.

chunks.title: Surface SNC friend trust-store status
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / Status Center visibility for local friend trust state
chunks.goal: Surface the local SNC friend trust-store contract in companion and tray status so future friend-mesh work is visible and fail-closed before any transport adapter exists.
acceptance: Companion status snapshots expose the configured friend trust-store path, friend-state counts, and auto-sync availability.
Invalid friend trust-store JSON fails closed through Status Center attention instead of silently enabling friend sync.
SNC tray build and v0 pipeline tests include the friend trust-store status source dependencies.

chunks.title: Add manual SNC friend pairing CLI
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / user-approved SNC friend request and acceptance workflow
chunks.goal: Add the first manual CLI fallback for user-approved SNC friend request, acceptance, and trust-store import so friend pairing can be exercised before UI or transport adapters exist.
acceptance: Strategic Nexus.exe can create a bounded schema_version 1 SNC friend request package from explicit local node identity fields.
Strategic Nexus.exe can create a matching friend acceptance package from a valid request and rejects self-acceptance without writing an unsafe package.
Strategic Nexus.exe can import a matching acceptance into a local friend trust store with auto-sync disabled by default.

chunks.title: Surface friend trust-store dashboard action
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / user-approved SNC friend request and acceptance workflow
chunks.goal: Expose a visible SNC status-dashboard action that opens the local friend trust-store artifact so manual friend-pairing state is reachable before UI pairing or transport adapters exist.
acceptance: SNC tray status JSON exposes top-level friend_trust_store state, reason, path, counts, and auto-sync fields.
The visible status dashboard includes a friend trust-store open action that is enabled only when the trust-store path exists.
The smoke test verifies the top-level friend trust-store status contract.

chunks.title: Surface friend pairing dashboard template
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / user-approved SNC friend request and acceptance workflow
chunks.goal: Expose a visible SNC status-dashboard action and stable tray JSON/brief contract for the manual friend-pairing CLI fallback before full pairing UI or transport adapters exist.
acceptance: The visible status dashboard includes a friend-pairing action that copies the request, acceptance, and trust-store import command template.
snc_tray_status.json exposes friend_pairing_command_template for release-companion consumers.
The next-steps brief and smoke test verify the manual friend-pairing template without enabling automatic sync or transport trust.

chunks.title: Surface friend pairing companion snapshot template
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / user-approved SNC friend request and acceptance workflow
chunks.goal: Expose the manual friend-pairing command template through the stable companion snapshot JSON, status summary, and --snc-status-snapshot stdout contract.
acceptance: CompanionFriendTrustStoreStatus carries the manual request, acceptance, and import command template.
Status snapshot JSON and --snc-status-snapshot stdout expose the command template without enabling auto-sync.
strategic_nexus_companion_test and the v0 pipeline gate verify the snapshot contract.

chunks.title: Surface friend pairing UI guidance
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / user-approved SNC friend request and acceptance workflow
chunks.goal: Make the manual SNC friend-pairing fallback understandable from the visible companion dashboard without enabling automatic sync or pretending the transport layer exists.
acceptance: The visible SNC dashboard exposes a concise friend-pairing guide/action that explains request, acceptance, and import sequencing from current status data.
The guide keeps auto-sync disabled by default and states that signed/encrypted transport is not active yet.
The change remains bounded to owner-facing guidance/UI around the existing manual CLI template and does not add transport trust.

chunks.title: Surface friend pairing guide status contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / user-approved SNC friend request and acceptance workflow
chunks.goal: Expose the manual SNC friend-pairing guide as a stable tray status JSON field for release-companion consumption, without enabling automatic sync or transport trust.
acceptance: snc_tray_status.json exposes friend_pairing_guide_text alongside friend_pairing_command_template.
The guide text includes request, acceptance, import, and auto-sync-disabled safety guidance.
The smoke test verifies the stable status JSON guide field.

chunks.title: Add SNC friend MP sync envelope contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted MP package sync between accepted SNC friends
chunks.goal: Add the first fail-closed local envelope contract for future signed/encrypted SNC friend MP package sync, without enabling transport, automatic download, or package apply.
acceptance: SNC friend MP sync envelopes parse only schema_version 1 with package_type snc_friend_mp_package_sync and bounded sender/recipient identities.
The envelope requires explicit approved signing and encryption algorithm labels plus package hash, encrypted payload hash, signature, and byte count metadata.
Unsupported algorithms, unsafe identities, missing hashes, missing signatures, self-recipient envelopes, and friends without mp_package_sync capability fail closed without enabling automatic sync.

chunks.title: Add manual SNC friend MP sync envelope CLI
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted MP package sync between accepted SNC friends
chunks.goal: Expose a manual CLI fallback for creating and verifying schema_version 1 SNC friend MP sync envelope metadata, while keeping cryptography, transport, automatic download, and package apply disabled.
acceptance: Strategic Nexus.exe can write a valid snc_friend_mp_package_sync envelope from explicit sender/recipient identity and package metadata fields.
Strategic Nexus.exe can verify an existing friend MP sync envelope and print stable key=value status without writing or staging package contents.
Malformed envelopes, unsupported algorithms, self-recipient envelopes, missing hashes/signatures, or missing mp_package_sync capabilities fail closed without creating transport trust.

chunks.title: Surface friend MP sync envelope command template
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted MP package sync between accepted SNC friends
chunks.goal: Expose the manual friend MP sync envelope create/verify command template through stable companion and tray status contracts for later UI/transport work, without enabling automatic sync.
acceptance: Companion friend trust-store status exposes a friend MP sync envelope command template with create and verify commands.
Tray status JSON exposes the same stable template for release-companion consumers.
The template is tested and remains explicit that it is a manual metadata fallback, not automatic transport or package apply.

chunks.title: Surface friend MP sync envelope dashboard action
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted MP package sync between accepted SNC friends
chunks.goal: Expose the manual friend MP sync envelope create/verify template as a visible SNC dashboard action, while keeping transport, automatic download, and package apply disabled.
acceptance: The visible SNC dashboard includes a friend MP sync envelope action that copies the manual create/verify command template.
The action text makes clear this is a manual metadata fallback and does not enable automatic sync, download, or staging.
The smoke test verifies the dashboard action is present when the template exists.

chunks.title: Add friend MP sync envelope apply gate
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / fail-closed package apply gate
chunks.goal: Expose a stable fail-closed apply-gate status for verified SNC friend MP sync envelopes before any automatic download, staging, transport, or package apply exists.
acceptance: Verified friend MP sync envelopes expose apply_allowed=false and manual_metadata_only while transport/staging remains disabled.
The same verify path reports blocked_stellaris_running when Stellaris is active.
Invalid envelopes fail closed through invalid_envelope and the v0 pipeline covers all three gate states.

chunks.title: Surface friend MP sync apply-gate template
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / fail-closed package apply gate
chunks.goal: Expose the friend MP sync verify apply-gate input in companion and tray command templates so release-companion surfaces do not hide the running-game safety parameter.
acceptance: Companion friend trust-store status template includes [stellaris_running:true|false] on verify.
Tray status JSON and dashboard copy action include the same apply-gate input and running-game safety wording.
Companion test, tray smoke, and v0 pipeline tests verify the template contract.

chunks.title: Add friend MP sync inbox plan gate
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted package sync guarded staging contract
chunks.goal: Add a fail-closed local inbox/staging plan for received SNC friend MP sync envelopes so release-companion code can reason about encrypted payload presence, running-game safety, and auto-sync policy before any transport, decryption, or package staging exists.
acceptance: A valid envelope plus encrypted payload path still reports package_staging_allowed=false and automatic_download_enabled=false until signed/encrypted transport and decrypt/verify staging exist.
Invalid envelopes, missing encrypted payloads, running Stellaris, and disabled friend auto-sync each produce explicit fail-closed states.
The CLI prints stable key=value fields for release-companion consumption without writing or staging gameplay-affecting files.

chunks.title: Surface friend MP sync inbox-plan template
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / guarded staging contract visibility
chunks.goal: Expose the manual friend MP sync inbox-plan command template through companion/tray status and the visible dashboard so release-companion surfaces can reach the new fail-closed staging plan without raw CLI lookup.
acceptance: Companion/tray status exposes a stable friend MP sync inbox-plan command template that includes envelope path, encrypted payload path, Stellaris running, and friend auto-sync inputs.
The visible SNC dashboard can copy the inbox-plan template and keeps wording explicit that it does not download, decrypt, or stage gameplay files.
Companion, tray smoke, and v0 pipeline tests verify the new template surface.

chunks.title: Add friend MP sync outbox plan gate
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted package sync guarded transport contract
chunks.goal: Add a fail-closed local outbox/send plan for SNC friend MP sync envelopes so release-companion code can reason about encrypted payload presence, running-game safety, and auto-sync policy before any transport adapter exists.
acceptance: A valid envelope plus encrypted payload path still reports send_allowed=false and transport_enabled=false until signed/encrypted transport exists.
Invalid envelopes, missing encrypted payloads, running Stellaris, and disabled friend auto-sync each produce explicit fail-closed states.
The CLI prints stable key=value fields for release-companion consumption without sending, uploading, or staging gameplay-affecting files.

chunks.title: Surface friend MP sync outbox-plan template
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / guarded transport contract visibility
chunks.goal: Expose the manual friend MP sync outbox-plan command template through companion/tray status and the visible dashboard so release-companion surfaces can reach the new fail-closed send plan without raw CLI lookup.
acceptance: Companion/tray status exposes a stable friend MP sync outbox-plan command template that includes envelope path, encrypted payload path, Stellaris running, and friend auto-sync inputs.
The visible SNC dashboard can copy the outbox-plan template and keeps wording explicit that it does not upload, send, download, decrypt, or stage gameplay files.
Companion, tray smoke, and v0 pipeline tests verify the new template surface.

chunks.title: Surface friend MP sync transport disabled status
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted package sync transport safety visibility
chunks.goal: Expose a stable fail-closed SNC friend MP sync transport status through companion/tray surfaces so release-companion UI can show that signed/encrypted transport is still disabled instead of inferring readiness from friend auto-sync state.
acceptance: Companion friend trust-store status exposes transport state and reason fields that stay disabled/not implemented until a real signed/encrypted transport adapter exists.
Tray status JSON and visible dashboard copy text expose the same disabled transport status without enabling upload, send, download, decrypt, staging, or package apply.
Companion, tray smoke, and v0 pipeline tests verify the status contract.

chunks.title: Block ambiguous campaign decision inputs
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 1D Entry-Point Scoped Post-Play Handoff / 3D Entry-Point Identity Handoff
chunks.goal: Fail closed when entry-point analysis reports campaign-level branch ambiguity so post-play handoff evidence can serialize but does not produce decision inputs or candidate generated-rule decisions for that ambiguous campaign.
acceptance: PostPlayPackageBuilder blocks every entry in a campaign whose entry-point analysis is branch-ambiguous.
Blocked entries keep explicit post_play_branch_ambiguity_blocks_decision_input warnings.
Downstream decision-input and candidate-decision package tests still pass for non-ambiguous mixed-ready fixtures.

chunks.title: Regress ambiguous post-play CLI fail-closed
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 1D Entry-Point Scoped Post-Play Handoff / branch-aware memory and rules selection
chunks.goal: Add v0 pipeline regression coverage that the CLI post-play handoff path keeps campaign-level branch ambiguity from producing decision inputs or candidate decisions.
acceptance: The regression creates an ambiguous post-play archive through CLI commands rather than only builder unit tests.
Decision-input CLI output reports zero decision inputs and branch-ambiguity-blocked entries.
Candidate-decision CLI output reports zero candidate decisions and does not pass unsafe ambiguous inputs downstream.

chunks.title: Verify friend MP sync outbox surface
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / guarded transport contract visibility
chunks.goal: Verify that the already-present friend MP sync outbox-plan template and disabled transport status are exposed through companion, tray, and visible dashboard surfaces.
acceptance: Companion status exposes a stable friend MP sync outbox-plan command template with envelope, encrypted payload, Stellaris running, and friend auto-sync inputs.
Tray status JSON exposes friend_mp_sync_outbox_plan_command_template plus disabled transport state/reason fields.
The visible SNC dashboard exposes the outbox copy action with no-send/no-upload/no-staging wording, and regression tests cover the contract.

chunks.title: Surface friend MP sync transport next step
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted package sync transport safety visibility
chunks.goal: Expose a stable fail-closed next-step field for disabled SNC friend MP sync transport so release-companion surfaces can guide manual package handoff without implying automatic sync exists.
acceptance: Companion friend trust-store status exposes a concise friend MP sync transport next-step string while transport remains disabled.
Tray status JSON exposes friend_mp_sync_transport_next_step alongside the disabled transport state and reason.
Visible dashboard/copy text includes the same manual handoff guidance without enabling upload, send, download, decrypt, staging, or package apply.

chunks.title: Surface friend MP sync preflight checklist
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / signed and encrypted package sync transport safety visibility
chunks.goal: Expose a stable fail-closed friend MP sync preflight checklist through companion and tray surfaces so release-companion UI can guide the manual pre-season flow while automatic sync remains disabled.
acceptance: Companion friend trust-store status exposes a concise friend MP sync preflight checklist that references the current MP package ZIP, envelope metadata, inbox/outbox plan checks, Stellaris-closed safety, and manual sharing/import.
Status Center summary text and status snapshot JSON expose the same checklist for release-companion consumers.
Tray status JSON and dashboard copy text expose the checklist without enabling upload, send, download, decrypt, staging, automatic sync, or package apply.

chunks.title: Verify friend trust-store visibility
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / local friend trust store visibility
chunks.goal: Verify that the existing friend trust store status surfaces keep exposing trust counts, auto-sync availability, and the manual pairing and MP sync command templates on current head.
acceptance: Companion status exposes trusted, revoked, blocked, and auto-sync counts plus auto-sync availability.
Companion and Status Center surfaces expose the manual friend pairing, friend MP sync envelope, inbox-plan, outbox-plan, and transport next-step text.
Unsupported friend trust store schema still fails closed with attention_required status.

chunks.title: Surface local LLM runtime install guidance
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Local LLM Model Manager / runtime install guidance
chunks.goal: Expose explicit owner-facing runtime install guidance in companion and tray status surfaces so reduced-mode local LLM states tell the owner what to install or prepare next without parsing raw status text.
acceptance: Companion status JSON exposes local_llm_install_guidance alongside the existing local LLM readiness fields.
The status-center summary and visible dashboard copy text include the same guidance when local LLM is reduced or user action is required, and keep it empty when the selected model is already ready.
The guidance stays fail closed and only reuses existing model runtime / prepare-command information.

chunks.title: Surface owner-facing local LLM model manager summary
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Local LLM Model Manager / owner-facing SNC Model Manager UI
chunks.goal: Expose a minimal owner-facing model-manager summary in companion and tray status surfaces so reduced-mode states show the selected model, current readiness, and next install or prepare action without requiring raw JSON spelunking.
acceptance: Companion and tray status surfaces expose the selected model and reduced-mode state together with the install guidance already present on current head.
The summary stays fail closed when no supported local model is selected or the selected model is unknown.
The new surface does not download, install, or auto-run a local model.

chunks.title: Surface local LLM catalog summary
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Local LLM Model Manager / supported model catalog visibility
chunks.goal: Expose the curated supported local LLM catalog in owner-facing companion and tray status surfaces so the model manager can show which models are allowed before selection while keeping unknown and unsupported models fail closed.
acceptance: Companion and tray local LLM status surfaces expose a supported-model catalog count and concise catalog summary.
The status center summary includes the same catalog visibility so the owner can see approved local model options without opening raw JSON.
Unknown selected models still fail closed and the new catalog visibility does not enable downloads, installs, or model execution.

chunks.title: Verify monthly reactive owner-test readiness
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Reactive Policy Pack Dispatch / owner-ready monthly reactive test contract
chunks.goal: Verify that the owner-ready monthly reactive test contract stays fail-closed until the published overlay is genuinely ready, and that SNC status, tray, and real-session loop outputs surface the same playbook path and next-action hints on current head.
acceptance: Companion and tray surfaces expose owner_test_playbook_path only when the monthly reactive owner-test contract is truly ready.
The ready-state contract keeps next_action, next_action_command_hint, and next_action_command_hint_source aligned with docs/MONTHLY_REACTIVE_OWNER_TEST_PLAYBOOK.md.
The non-ready baseline stays fail-closed and the targeted tray / pipeline tests pass on current head.

chunks.title: Verify friend MP sync outbox-plan surface
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / friend MP sync outbox-plan template
chunks.goal: Verify that the companion, tray, and visible dashboard surfaces expose the stable friend MP sync outbox-plan command template with no-send/no-upload/no-staging wording on current head.
acceptance: Companion status exposes a stable friend_mp_sync_outbox_plan_command_template with envelope, encrypted payload, Stellaris running, and friend auto-sync inputs.
Tray status JSON exposes friend_mp_sync_outbox_plan_command_template and disabled transport state/reason fields without implying upload, send, download, or staging readiness.
The visible SNC dashboard exposes the outbox copy action with explicit no-send/no-upload/no-staging wording, and the regression tests cover the contract on current head.

chunks.title: Verify MP ZIP handoff continuity surface
chunks.roadmap_anchor: MP ZIP Handoff And Host Rotation Continuity
chunks.goal: Verify on current head that MP ZIP handoff continuity still exposes package path, hash, bytes, previous-host availability, and host/client readiness without touching the dirty release-companion write set.
acceptance: Companion and tray status surfaces still expose mp_package_zip_path, mp_package_zip_hash, and mp_package_zip_bytes.
Companion and Status Center output still expose host_readiness, client_readiness_gate, and host_handoff_state or previous_host_available continuity text on current head.

chunks.title: Verify SNC status UI state persistence

acceptance: Companion status output includes status_ui_state_path and the status-center summary text mentions the persisted UI state note.
Missing or malformed SNC UI state files fall back to default status-window placement and overview page without crashing.
Targeted companion, tray, and v0 pipeline tests pass on current head.

chunks.title: Verify release-companion MP package UX on current head
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / current-head usability verification
chunks.goal: Verify on current head that the companion, tray, and dashboard still expose the release-companion MP package handoff surface, including copyable share guidance, strict verify/import hints, mismatch warnings, and the no-IP host/client workflow boundary.
acceptance: Companion status exposes the MP package handoff details and copyable share guidance on current head.
Tray and dashboard surfaces still expose the strict verify/import hints plus mismatch warning presentation without requiring an IP-address workflow.
Targeted companion, tray, and v0 pipeline tests pass on current head without changing the release-companion write set.

chunks.title: Support report preview open hint
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Status Center / support report approval and preview contract
chunks.goal: Make the local support report preview helper emit a direct open-command hint for the generated preview file and lock that hint into the v0 regression path.
acceptance: tools/prepare_snc_support_report.ps1 emits a support_report_open_command_hint for the generated preview file.
The v0 pipeline regression verifies the preview helper output includes the open hint alongside the approval and privacy text.
The change stays bounded to support-report preview review workflow and does not enable automatic sending.

chunks.title: Verify release-companion action surface on current head
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion Orchestrator UX / status center actions for archive, model, publish, and MP package state
chunks.goal: Verify that the current head keeps the release-companion archive, model manager, publish gate, and MP package handoff actions visible through the companion, tray, and next-steps surfaces with fail-closed wording.
acceptance: Companion and tray surfaces expose archive state/actions, model-manager guidance, generated-overlay publish gate state, and MP package handoff state on current head.
Status Center and next-steps brief wording keep the archive, model, publish, and MP package follow-up paths explicit and fail closed when a path is unavailable or not ready.
Targeted companion, tray, and v0 pipeline tests pass on current head without changing the release-companion write set.

chunks.title: Verify enum expansion safety on current head
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Schema versioning / enum expansion safety
chunks.goal: Verify that current-head bridge and generated-overlay enum coverage still fails closed for unsupported future values while the roadmap status is corrected to implemented.
acceptance: Generated-overlay contract tests still reject future event-family and source-quality values on current head.
The roadmap status for enum expansion safety is updated to implemented, matching the existing coverage in tests/generated_overlay_contract_test.cpp.
Targeted validation passes without modifying the release-companion write set.

chunks.title: Document schema migration gap
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 12C Backward Migration Rules
chunks.goal: Document the missing migration registry contract and the owner-visible degraded-state warning shape so future migration work has a bounded fail-closed target.
acceptance: docs/SCHEMA_VERSIONING_RULES.md names the future migration registry and degraded-state warning contract.
docs/DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md 12C notes the same bounded next step.
The documentation stays fail-closed and does not pretend a migration registry already exists.

acceptance: The observer-target profile contract exposes a bounded placeholder or validation hook for target-specific rule candidates without publishing gameplay-affecting overlay output.
Missing evidence, invalid confidence, or unsupported source quality still fail closed and keep rule candidates empty.
The next worker can claim this chunk without reinterpreting the 3A contract from scratch.

chunks.title: Observer-target interpretation summary
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 3A Subjective Other-Empire Profiles And Targeted Rules
chunks.goal: Add a deterministic target-specific interpretation summary on the observer-target profile contract so the profile can expose a cautious, confidence-scored memory note before gameplay-affecting rule generation exists.
acceptance: The observer-target profile contract exposes a deterministic target-specific interpretation summary and keeps it separate from gameplay-affecting rule candidates.
Missing evidence, invalid confidence, or unsupported source quality still fail closed and keep the summary-only contract intact.
The next worker can claim this chunk without reinterpreting the 3A summary-only profile contract from scratch.

chunks.goal: Verify that zero-history bootstrap provenance remains visible on current head while the observer-target and generated-overlay contract surfaces stay fail-closed.
acceptance: Generated overlay and companion contract tests still surface zero-history bootstrap provenance on current head.

The checklist still points at dist/private_reports/snc_next_steps_brief.txt and the real_session_v0_loop evidence files as the post-run evidence sources.

dist/strategic_nexus_companion_test.exe and tools/run_v0_pipeline_tests.cmd pass on current head.

chunks.title: Surface MP host rotation sync gap
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / host-owned automatic handoff sync for host rotation
chunks.goal: Expose the host-owned automatic handoff sync gap explicitly in companion, tray, and status-center output so the remaining 15G host-rotation work stays fail-closed and discoverable.
acceptance: Companion status JSON and status-center summary expose mp_host_rotation_sync_state, mp_host_rotation_sync_reason, and mp_host_rotation_sync_next_step.
Tray dashboard and multiplayer page text surface the host-rotation sync gap with manual host handoff as the fallback.
The new host-rotation text stays explicit, fail-closed, and aligned with the current manual export/import fallback.

chunks.title: Verify MP host rotation handoff visibility on current head
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 15G. Release Companion MP Package UX / host-rotation handoff workflow
chunks.goal: Verify that the current-head companion, tray, and dashboard surfaces keep mp_host_rotation_sync_state, mp_host_rotation_sync_reason, and mp_host_rotation_sync_next_step visible and fail closed, with manual host handoff fallback wording.
acceptance: Companion, tray, and Status Center surfaces expose mp_host_rotation_sync_state, mp_host_rotation_sync_reason, and mp_host_rotation_sync_next_step.
The wording stays explicit about manual host handoff fallback and the signed/encrypted transport gap.
Targeted companion, tray, and v0 pipeline tests pass on current head without changing the write set.

chunks.title: Surface campaign-library pinned-exception gap
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 6F. Pinned Campaign And Library Override UX / current owner guidance
chunks.goal: Add explicit owner-facing warning text to campaign-library status and brief output so users know pinned campaign exceptions are still unavailable when the active library is truncated.
acceptance: Status Center summary and next-steps brief both mention that pinned campaign exceptions are not yet available when the active library is truncated.
The note stays fail-closed and still tells the owner to keep or restore local save folders when broader coverage is needed.
The change stays bounded to campaign-library owner guidance and does not add pin/unpin behavior yet.

chunks.title: Surface personality alignment in doctrine output
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 9C Personality-To-Rule Validation / personality-aware doctrine output surface
chunks.goal: Expose the current personality-driven doctrine alignment in the worker output path so the owner can inspect when a proposed doctrine was upgraded or downgraded for capability or fear mismatch.
acceptance: The doctrine output or companion-facing summary includes a bounded personality alignment note when a focus empire was available.
Downgrade and upgrade reasons stay fail-closed and do not invent unsupported personality evidence.
Targeted personality and pipeline regression continues to pass on current head.

chunks.title: Verify local LLM reduced-mode guidance on current head
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 1G. Local LLM Model Manager / reduced-mode guidance visibility
chunks.goal: Verify that SNC status, tray, and companion surfaces keep local_llm_install_guidance, local_llm_model_state_path, and review_local_llm_model_manager next-action fields visible and fail closed on current head.
acceptance: Companion and tray surfaces expose local_llm_install_guidance and local_llm_model_state_path.
When local LLM attention is active, next_action points at review_local_llm_model_manager and next_action_path points at local_llm_model_state_path.
dist/strategic_nexus_companion_test.exe, tools/smoke_snc_tray.cmd, and tools/run_v0_pipeline_tests.cmd pass on current head.

chunks.title: Verify entry-point ambiguity routing on current head
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 1D. Entry-Point Scoped Post-Play Handoff / branch-aware memory-rules routing
chunks.goal: Verify that current-head companion, tray, and real-session outputs keep entry-point analysis, branch ambiguity, and memory-recovery routing visible and fail closed, with review_entry_point_ambiguity still taking precedence over review_memory_recovery_status when ambiguity exists.
acceptance: Companion status text and JSON expose entry_point_analysis_path, entry_point_readiness, entry_point_reason, and memory_recovery_anchor_entry_point_id.
When branch ambiguity is present, review_entry_point_ambiguity remains the top-level next action and entry_point_branch_ambiguity_detected stays visible in companion and tray outputs.
dist/strategic_nexus_companion_test.exe, tools/smoke_snc_tray.cmd, and tools/run_v0_pipeline_tests.cmd pass on current head.

chunks.title: Surface friend mesh update state
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 15G. Release Companion MP Package UX / owner-facing mesh update state
chunks.goal: Expose a top-level friend mesh update state, reason, and next-step across companion and tray status surfaces so waiting, ready, blocked, mismatch, and degraded handoff conditions are visible without reading the raw friend trust store and package fields separately.
acceptance: Companion snapshot JSON and Status Center summary expose friend_mesh_update_state, friend_mesh_update_reason, and friend_mesh_update_next_step.
Tray status JSON and summary text expose the same friend mesh aggregate and remain fail-closed for missing or invalid friend trust store/package data.
Targeted companion and tray regression tests cover the aggregate on current head.

chunks.title: Surface MP host rotation sync gap in next-steps brief
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 15G. Release Companion MP Package UX / host-rotation handoff workflow
chunks.goal: Expose the host-owned automatic handoff sync gap in the copyable next-steps brief so the manual host-rotation fallback stays visible in the same owner-facing file as the friend-mesh update state.
acceptance: snc_next_steps_brief.txt includes mp_host_rotation_sync_state, mp_host_rotation_sync_reason, and mp_host_rotation_sync_next_step when MP handoff data is available.
The brief keeps the existing manual host-rotation fallback wording fail-closed and aligned with the status JSON summary.
tools/smoke_snc_tray.ps1 and tools/run_v0_pipeline_tests.ps1 cover the new brief lines on current head.

chunks.title: Document MP host rotation sync gap in season guide
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 15G. Release Companion MP Package UX / host-rotation handoff workflow
chunks.goal: Make the host-owned automatic handoff sync gap explicit in the canonical multiplayer season guide so the manual host-rotation fallback is discoverable without opening the tray brief or raw status JSON.
acceptance: docs/MULTIPLAYER_SEASON_ORCHESTRATOR.md names mp_host_rotation_sync_state, mp_host_rotation_sync_reason, and mp_host_rotation_sync_next_step together.
The guide keeps the manual host-rotation fallback wording aligned with the current status surfaces and next-steps brief.
A targeted rg-based verification or equivalent docs check proves the new guide text is present.

chunks.title: Scaffold integrated empire-state contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 3B. Internal Pressure And Strategic Reputation
chunks.goal: Add a bounded summary-only integrated empire-state contract with internal pressure, strategic reputation, doctrine inertia, field availability, and fail-closed validation so later analysis can reason about coherent empire state without inventing gameplay-affecting output.
acceptance: A new integrated empire-state contract or builder exists for summary-only internal pressure and strategic reputation scaffolding.
The contract exposes bounded field availability and missing-information reporting for unavailable ethics/resources/government/civics/history inputs.
Different empire inputs produce different pressure/reputation interpretations while invalid or mismatched inputs fail closed.
The v0 pipeline regression passes after the new contract is added.

chunks.title: Surface friend trust-store control surface
chunks.roadmap_anchor: 15G. Release Companion MP Package UX / local friend trust store controls
chunks.goal: Expose explicit trust-store update controls for revoke, block, and disable-auto-sync flows in companion, tray, and CLI surfaces so the local friend trust store is more than a passive read-only status surface.
acceptance: Companion snapshot, tray JSON, and status-center summary expose friend_trust_store_controls_state, friend_trust_store_controls_reason, friend_trust_store_controls_next_step, and the trust-store update command template.
The trust-store update command safely changes trust_state and auto_sync_enabled for an existing friend entry while invalid inputs fail closed.
The targeted trust-store tests and the broader v0 pipeline regression pass on current head.
